steps.title: Recognize the exponential growth pattern
steps.content: The bacteria double every day, which means the population follows exponential growth. Exponential growth has the form: initial amount times a growth factor raised to the time power.

steps.title: Identify the parameters
steps.content:
From the problem:
• Initial number of bacteria (a) = 44,000
• Growth factor when doubling each day (b) = 2

steps.title: Write the equation and verify
steps.content:
Substitute $a = 44,000$ and $b = 2$: $$y = 44,000 \cdot 2^t$$ Verify at $t = 0$: $y = 44,000(2)^0 = 44,000$ ✓ at the start.
Verify at $t = 1$: $y = 44,000(2)^1 = 88,000$, double the initial amount ✓.
This matches choice D — D is correct.
